title: No Despawing Items
body: This datapack ensures that any item you drop in the world will never despawn, no matter how long you leave it. Whether you die far from your base, accidentally throw something valuable, or simply forget where you left your loot, your items will always be there waiting for you. It's perfect for players who want a more forgiving survival experience or just hate losing their hard-earned gear to the despawn timer. With this simple addition, you can explore, build, and battle without worrying about the clock ticking on your stuff.
